texto: What you don’t have you don’t need it now. What you don’t know you can feel it somehow . What you don’t have you don’t need it now , don’t need it now It was a beautiful day

texto: Heaven on Earth, we need it nowI'm sick of all of this hanging aroundSick of sorrow, sick of the painI'm sick of hearing again and againThat there's gonna be peace on Earth......Tell the ones who hear no soundWhose sons are living in the groundPeace on EarthNo whos or whysNo one cries like a mother criesFor peace on Earth
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a U2: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a familia. O trecho “Heaven on Earth, we need it nowI'm sick of all of this hanging aroundSick of sorrow, sick of the …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, paz, reflexao pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
